reasoning: While the pipeline suggests auto-approval, the LLM fidelity and programmatic signals identify significant defects including the omission of critical contact information and the loss of essential instructional images (UI elements and keyboard layouts). The low shingling recall (0.821) and precision (0.66) corroborate the LLM's findings of content loss, making human intervention necessary to ensure accessibility and instructional integrity.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: On the final page ('Get in touch'), the output is missing significant contact information. The source document lists three ways to get in touch: Website, Phone, and Email. The output only contains the phone number, omitting 'Web: www.ablr360.com' and 'Email: kim.casey@ablr360.com'. This represents a loss of more than 25% of the relevant content for this short section.

The reading order generally follows the logical flow of the slides. However, on page 34, the reading order is disrupted. The heading 'Thank You!' (element index 164), which belongs to the right-hand column, is placed between the heading 'Get in touch' (element index 163) and its associated content 'Ablr' (element index 165) from the left-hand column. This intermixing of unrelated headers and content blocks is a significant divergence from the source's logical column-based layout.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 34 contains two columns. Left column: 'Get in touch' followed by contact details ('Ablr', 'Web...', 'Call...', 'Email...'). Right column: 'Thank You!' followed by a QR code.
concerns.output_quote: 163: heading 'Get in touch', 164: heading 'Thank You!', 165: paragraph 'Ablr', 167: paragraph 'Call: 833-294-2257'.

concerns.analysis: Numerous meaningful instructional images from the source PDF are missing in the HTML output. While some screenshots were converted into tables, many others showing software UI elements (e.g., Slide 11 Tags panel, Slide 12 Accessibility Checker, Slide 21 Speech Viewer), keyboard layouts with highlighted keys (Slides 16, 18, 26, 27, 28), and the final slide's QR code are completely absent. These images are essential for understanding the instructional content.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains instructional screenshots on nearly every slide, such as the Tags panel on page 11, keyboard shortcuts on page 16, and macOS settings on page 25. Page 34 also contains a QR code.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML output is missing the corresponding images for the Tags panel, keyboard graphics, macOS settings screens, and the QR code in their respective sections.
concerns.location: Multiple sections including 'Form Tags in Adobe Acrobat', 'Turning NVDA Off', 'Enabling VoiceOver Mac', and 'Get in touch'.

concerns.analysis: Several numbered lists in the source document have been incorrectly converted into unordered lists in the output. This occurs on page 6 ('Forms in MS Word'), page 7 ('Forms in Adobe Acrobat'), page 9 ('Radio buttons in Adobe Acrobat'), and page 10 ('Preview Form in Adobe Acrobat'). In all these cases, the 'list_type' is set to 'unordered' and the item numbers ('1.', '2.', etc.) have been removed from the text content.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 6 contains a numbered list (1. Use underline, 2. Can use...). Page 7 contains a numbered list (1. Enter field name, 2. Select All..., 3. Add Tooltip, 4. Save time...). Page 9 contains a numbered list (1. Add radio..., 2. Select all..., 3. Enter Group..., 4. Enter Tooltip..., 5. Enter Choice...). Page 10 contains a numbered list (1. Use Preview..., 2. To clear..., 3. Select Clear...).

concerns.analysis: On the final page of the document (page 34), two critical links are missing from the output. The website URL ('Web: www.ablr360.com') and the contact email ('Email: kim.casey@ablr360.com') are clearly visible in the source PDF but are entirely absent from the corresponding section in the JSON output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 34 contains the text 'Web: www.ablr360.com' and 'Email: kim.casey@ablr360.com'.
concerns.output_quote: The text elements for page 34 only include 'Ablr' (165) and 'Call: 833-294-2257' (167).

action_items: Restore missing instructional images essential for the training content.
Repair the content on the final slide to include the missing contact information and links.
Correct the reading order on page 34 to follow the logical layout.
Revert unordered lists back to numbered lists on pages 6, 7, 9, and 10.
